film.title: Parwana
film.overview: A con-man/thief robs a suitcase containing explosives belonging to terrorists.

dialogues.dialogue: Yes. Uncle, take! Are not you ashamed to act with a thief like this? Do not laugh to call it a thief! Close your eyes when you see the real thief
How come these dangerous bombs? The investigation continues. Will keep you posted. I am ashamed of what happened, sir. Even I never imagined that someone would take the briefcase and escape.
We have an important meeting for the mission. Just not at 4:30 in the club Scorpio. Are not you ashamed to come into this house? What person are you coming? Was a great hero. Hero!
Sir, your picture will be the title page of our magazine. So proud of you, dear! Thank you. One minute. First I shoot with it.
